description: Style NoteBag that hoop with this pair of nike Air Max Quarter shoes. Designed for Basketball lovers, this shoe adds an urban flair to the classic sport shoe and ensures optimum performance.Product DetailsSynthetic leather upper with Nike swoosh overlays on the midfoot, central lace-ups, perforations on the forefoot and midfoot region and sockliner that moulds to the shape of the footPadded tongue and innerEncapsulated Air-Sole unit in the heel region and full length Pylon midsoleDurable rubber outsole with herringbone groovesMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
